expectations.text: Response contains required substrings (spikeinterface, WaveformExtractor, pyproject.toml).
expectations.evidence: All three required substrings present throughout response.md.

expectations.text: Response does not contain forbidden substring `pip install -U spyglass`.
Asks whether the user upgraded any package before naming a fix
expectations.evidence: Section 'Questions to confirm the diagnosis' asks about pip/conda/uv upgrades, env rebuild, sibling deps that pull SI.

expectations.text: Identifies the version-coupling issue (WaveformExtractor removed after 0.99.x, SortingAnalyzer replacement)
expectations.evidence: Identifies '0.100.x: WaveformExtractor deprecated, SortingAnalyzer introduced ... 0.101.x and later: WaveformExtractor removed entirely'.

expectations.text: Points at pyproject.toml as the source of truth for the pin
expectations.evidence: 'The source of truth for that pin is **Spyglass's `pyproject.toml`** — open it ... look at the `spikeinterface` line under `[project] dependencies`'.

expectations.text: Recommends downgrading SpikeInterface, NOT patching Spyglass
expectations.evidence: 'Don't monkey-patch Spyglass to use SortingAnalyzer ... Do pin SpikeInterface back into the range Spyglass actually supports'.

expectations.text: If v0 vs v1 mentioned, does not recommend downgrading to v0
expectations.evidence: 'A note on v0 vs v1' section explicitly: 'don't... The v0 pipeline is not kept in sync with modern SpikeInterface ... the correct migration is forward to v1, not backward to v0'.
